**Acceptance Criteria**

No blocking findings. The shared type-label encoding is centralized in [labels.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:136), with extraction through [type_label_value](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:239) and construction through [type_label](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:157). The originally listed sites now use the helpers, including [issue.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/commands/issue.rs:36), [batch_create.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/commands/batch_create.rs:553), [breakdown.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/commands/breakdown.rs:607), and [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:838).

`rg` found no production `starts_with("type:")`, `strip_prefix("type:")`, or raw `format!("type:...")` bypasses outside tests/docs. Helper behavior is covered in [labels.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:500).

**Architecture / Separation**

No storage, command, CLI, or output boundary violation found. The label semantics live in the shared labels/domain utility, while command code only consumes the helpers.

**Functional Paradigm**

No new functional-style debt found. The helpers use iterator-based extraction, e.g. [labels.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:240).

**Correctness / Invariants**

No regressions found for atomic writes, event logging, gate semantics, assignee format, label format, PID safety, or issue state invariants. Prior blockers are addressed: [type_hierarchy.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/type_hierarchy.rs:591), [domain/queries.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:210), [validation/rules.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:370), and [commands/validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:190) now use shared helpers.

**Safety**

`#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains enforced in [lib.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/lib.rs:6) and [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14). No unsafe-code regression found.

**Testing**

Used the provided succeeded cargo-ci gate as primary evidence: [result.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/.jit/gate-runs/ddd7dc81-8ae1-49a7-abf8-e04e64dca078/result.json:9) is passed for current commit `94af6423`, with `fmt`, `clippy`, and `2721 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored` at [result.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/.jit/gate-runs/ddd7dc81-8ae1-49a7-abf8-e04e64dca078/result.json:14). Per instruction, I did not rerun cargo tests. I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

**Error Handling**

No new `unwrap()` / `expect()` in non-test library code found in the reviewed change surface, and no contextual-error regression identified.

**CLI Contract**

No CLI command surface changed; no `--json` regression found.

**Documentation**

The new public label APIs have doc comments and examples, including [TYPE_NAMESPACE](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:122), [type_label](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:138), and [type_label_value](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-e3e6d47d/crates/jit/src/labels.rs:211).

**Prior Review Feedback**

The most recent blockers are resolved. The remaining raw construction/matching sites called out in `type_hierarchy.rs`, `domain/queries.rs`, `validation/rules.rs`, and `commands/validate.rs` now delegate to label helpers.

**Jit Issue Management**

`./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. `issue.dependencies` is empty, so there are no prerequisite issues to validate.

VERDICT: PASS
